title: the fact that + S + V（同位語子句）

formulas.zh: 同位語子句：用 that 子句說明前面名詞的具體內容
同位語子句：表達可能性、願望或想法的名詞後接 that 子句

explanation: 同位語子句用來說明或進一步解釋前面名詞的具體內容。該名詞通常為抽象名詞，如 fact、news、idea、belief、hope、possibility 等。that 引導的子句直接補充說明該名詞。注意：同位語子句的 that 不能省略，也不能用 which 替代。that 子句內容為肯定或否定陳述句。此結構常見於新聞報導、學術表達或正式文體中。

examples.eng: The fact that climate change threatens our planet is undeniable.
examples.chi: 氣候變化威脅我們星球這個事實是不可否認的。

examples.eng: The news that she won the scholarship made her family very proud.
examples.chi: 她獲得獎學金的消息使她的家人非常驕傲。

examples.eng: We share the belief that education is the key to success.
examples.chi: 我們都認為教育是成功的關鍵這一信念。

examples.eng: The possibility that remote work becomes permanent is increasing rapidly.
examples.chi: 遠距工作成為永久制度的可能性正在迅速增加。

extension.tip: 判斷是否為同位語子句：若 that 子句內容直接補充說明前面名詞，且名詞為抽象名詞，則為同位語。勿與定語從句混淆：定語從句用 that/which 修飾，同位語子句的 that 不可省略且不用 which。

examples.test: The idea that she proposed is excellent.
examples.result: → idea 後為定語從句（修飾 idea），that 可省略為 she proposed

examples.test: The idea that she is talented impressed everyone.
examples.result: → idea 後為同位語子句（說明 idea 的內容），that 不可省略

examples.test: We rejected the assumption that the project would fail.
examples.result: → that 子句說明 assumption 的具體內容，為同位語子句，that 必須保留

extension.note: 同位語子句用 that 補充說明抽象名詞內容，that 必保留，內容為完整句子。

parts: online shopping has transformed retail is widely accepted.
exercises.sentence: The fact that online shopping has transformed retail is widely accepted.
exercises.translation: 線上購物改變零售業這個事實被廣泛接受。

exercises.sentence: We all share the belief that teamwork leads to better results.
exercises.translation: 我們都相信團隊合作能帶來更好的結果這一信念。

parts: he was appointed as CEO surprised the board members.
exercises.sentence: The news that he was appointed as CEO surprised the board members.
exercises.translation: 他被任命為執行長的消息讓董事會成員感到驚訝。

parts: artificial intelligence will replace human workers cannot be ignored.
exercises.sentence: The possibility that artificial intelligence will replace human workers cannot be ignored.
exercises.translation: 人工智能將取代人類工作者的可能性不能被忽視。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適合的選項來完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The fact _______ he succeeded in his career made his parents very proud.
mc_exercises.explanation: 同位語子句必須用 that 引導，用來說明前面的抽象名詞 fact。選項 A（which）用於非限制性關係子句，不能引導同位語子句；C（what）為複合關係代名詞，與本句結構不符；D（when）為時間副詞，不適用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇能正確補充前面名詞的選項
mc_exercises.question_eng: The news _______ the company will expand to five new markets next year excited all the employees.
mc_exercises.explanation: news 是抽象名詞，其後的同位語子句應用 that 引導。該子句「the company will expand to five new markets next year」直接說明新聞的內容。B（which）、C（in which）和 D（where）都用於定語從句，不符合同位語子句的用法。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的詞彙完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The belief _______ education is the key to breaking the cycle of poverty has driven her to establish schools in rural areas.
mc_exercises.explanation: belief 後接同位語子句需用 that。該子句「education is the key to breaking the cycle of poverty」直接說明該信念的具體內容。A（what）為複合相對代名詞，若使用應改構句；B（which）用於定語從句；D（as）為連接詞但不用於同位語子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 從文法和邏輯判斷，選擇正確的引導詞
mc_exercises.question_eng: The possibility _______ artificial intelligence will surpass human intelligence in specific domains is no longer merely theoretical; it is a reality we must prepare for in our educational systems.
mc_exercises.explanation: possibility 為抽象名詞，其同位語子句用 that 引導。子句「artificial intelligence will surpass human intelligence in specific domains」說明該可能性的具體內容。A（which）為定語關係代詞；C（whereby）為介系詞式關係副詞，用於說明方式；D（whether）引導疑問子句，不用於同位語結構。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他考上名校的事實讓全家人都很高興。
translation_exercises.answer: The fact that he was admitted to a prestigious university made the whole family very happy.
hints: 提示1：使用『the fact that + S + V』結構，that子句內容為『他被名校錄取』這個事實
提示2：注意that後接完整陳述句，不能省略that或用which替代；『考上』用被動語態『was admitted to』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 沒有人質疑她能贏得比賽的可能性。
translation_exercises.answer: No one questioned the possibility that she could win the competition.
hints: 提示1：使用『the possibility that + S + V』結構，that子句說明『她可能贏得比賽』的可能性內容
提示2：情態動詞can在過去式變為could；『質疑』用questioned表達

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師的信念是學生應該主動學習而不是被動接受知識。
translation_exercises.answer: The teacher's belief that students should take the initiative to study rather than passively accept knowledge is correct.
hints: 提示1：使用『the belief that + S + V』結構，that子句內容為『學生應主動學習而非被動接受』這個信念的具體說明
提示2：that子句內含對比結構『should do A rather than do B』；注意整句動詞一致（is correct）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 國內疫情已控制的消息激勵了許多人恢復正常生活的希望，儘管有些人對此仍持懷疑態度。
translation_exercises.answer: The news that the domestic epidemic had been brought under control inspired many people with the hope that they could resume their normal lives, though some remained skeptical about it.
key_points: the news that + S + V (帶news的同位語子句)
the hope that + S + V (帶hope的同位語子句)
hints: 提示1：句子中包含兩個同位語子句——第一個『the news that the domestic epidemic had been brought under control』說明消息內容，第二個『the hope that they could resume their normal lives』說明希望的具體內容
提示2：注意時態：第一個that子句用過去完成式『had been brought』表達已完成的狀態；第二個that子句用『could resume』表達基於該消息所產生的可能性
